description: Salakau is a secret society and gang based in Singapore, founded in the early 1970s. The name means 'three six nine' in Hokkien, referencing the Eighteen Arhats. They are involved in drug trafficking, extortion, prostitution, and white-collar crime. The gang has a history of violent turf wars and has been targeted by the Singapore Police Force's Secret Societies Branch.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2020, two Salakau members were arrested by Malaysian police for smuggling illegal drugs from Singapore to Johor Bahru by drone.
country_links.context: Salakau members smuggled drugs from Singapore to Johor Bahru, Malaysia by drone.
